Amended Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order For Stay On Discovery
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion For Order For Stay On Discovery is Granted in part and denied in part. The court stays the taking of Defendant's deposition for six months or until the criminal case is disposed of, whichever comes first. The court will review the stay if the matter has not been resolved within six months. However, written discovery and third party discovery may proceed. Defendant retains the right to assert the right against self-incrimination as to specific interrogatories, requests for admission, and document requests. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
